response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive fullstack development experience with strong proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and relational databases, aligning well with the role's requirements. His background includes relevant projects in energy/geo-data platforms and AI-agent infrastructure, though his recent experience leans more toward senior/lead roles rather than junior/mid-level entry points. His diverse technical stack and architectural depth suggest rapid adaptability, but his salary expectations and seniority may not perfectly match the entry-level budget.
strengths: Strong fullstack development expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven experience in scalable, event-driven platforms and Kubernetes deployments
Demonstrated ability to integrate multiple data sources and optimize workflows
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role with extensive senior/lead experience
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (uses MongoDB and other SQL variants)
High salary expectations may not align with entry-level compensation
